title: Manager (Learning, Development & Engagement) | Bedok | up $7K per month
description:
We’re looking for a passionate and strategic Manager, Learning & Development & Engagement to shape our client's learning ecosystem, build future-ready talent, and create an engaging, resilient workplace where people thrive.

If you enjoy designing impactful learning journeys, developing high-potential talent, and energising teams through meaningful engagement initiatives—this role is for you.

🔹 Key Responsibilities

Learning & Development (L&D)

  • Develop and implement L&D strategies aligned to organisational goals and national/industry best practices.

  • Lead the planning, implementation, and day-to-day management of the Learning Management System (LMS).

  • Conduct Learning Needs Analysis (LNA) and develop annual training plans in consultation with Department Heads.

  • Coordinate and organise internal and external training programmes, including employee orientation and in-house training.

  • Drive e-learning adoption by motivating staff, managing system administration, and tracking completion targets.

  • Prepare and present training plans, reports, statistics, and insights to internal stakeholders.

  • Manage end-to-end training administration including registrations, grants, finance processes, evaluations, and training budget tracking.

  • Maintain accurate training records, shared drives, and learning-related documentation.

  • Promote learning initiatives through internal platforms such as newsletters and communications channels.

Talent Management (TM)

  • Design and implement career progression and succession planning frameworks to support internal mobility, reskilling, and retention.

  • Define talent criteria, identify high-potential employees, and develop structured talent development initiatives.

  • Partner with HR Business Partners and business stakeholders to address short- and long-term talent needs.

  • Build strong talent pipelines through engagement with key talents, educational institutions, recruitment partners, and employee referrals.

Employee Engagement & Wellbeing

  • Design and execute engagement programmes to strengthen employee connection, motivation, and productivity.

  • Champion workplace wellbeing by promoting resilience, positive mindset, and health awareness.

  • Collaborate with HR Business Partners to establish and implement a workplace wellbeing framework.

  • Prepare and disseminate staff communications, engagement updates, and relevant reports.

  • Support ad-hoc HR and people initiatives as required.

🔹 Requirements

  • Bachelor’s Degree in a relevant discipline from a recognised institution.

  • Min 5 years of relevant experience in Learning & Development, Talent Management, or Employee Engagement.

  • Comfortable managing LMS platforms; experience with SAP SuccessFactors and e-learning/virtual training tools is an advantage.

How to Apply

Send your updated CV to deborah@crew.sg with - Your expected salary, last drawn package, notice period / earliest start date

Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.


Ho Yu Qing Deborah (R1104551)
